title: Lordog/dive-into-llms
friendlyTitle: A hands-on guide to learning large language models
summary: Dive into LLMs is a notebook-based, Chinese-language hands-on tutorial series covering large-model development and related topics. It was among the most popular AI-related repositories in the daily trending set, with about 42.9k stars at review time.
friendlySummary: This popular project has notebooks and lessons for learning how large language models work and how to build with them. The main material is in Chinese.
whyItMatters: Use the notebooks and accompanying materials as a structured learning path for understanding LLM concepts and implementation work. It is particularly useful for learners comfortable working from Chinese-language technical resources.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can give learners a step-by-step way to study LLM ideas and try code examples.
